meaning: v.(使)磨损,(使)疲惫n.磨破,破烂,疲惫状态
examples: Watching her frazzle like a drop of water placed on a hot frying pan actually helped.
She worked herself to a frazzle.
There he goes again coughing himself to a frazzle.
Palace owner Lee Kim Yew, an affable man with an enviable talent for business, remained unfazed by the fervor and frazzle.
